spec.name: auto_resolve_deps
spec.description: Automatically resolves and installs dependencies for newly cloned projects in /agentOS/workspace/builder/
spec.implementation: A tool wrapper that takes a project directory or git URL, analyzes the package manifest (e.g., requirements.txt, package.json, go.mod), invokes the appropriate install command via safe shell execution with timeout/rollback protection, and logs success/failure states.
spec.rationale: Newly cloned projects in /agentOS/workspace/builder/ currently fail if dependencies are unmet, blocking downstream build tasks. This capability ensures idempotent, safe dependency resolution without manual intervention.

rationale: Prior steps indicated a need to resolve dependencies automatically; proposing this tool addresses the gap in the system.
